flags.concern: Are the proposed changes technically correct?: Checked Step 5 against the actual hook signature in `src/shared/state/createEntityStore.ts:39-44,400-449` and the existing null/undefined caller coverage in `src/tools/join-clips/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClipsSettings.test.ts:64-88`. The plan says "when `projectId` is truthy, subscribe with `useEntity(projectId)`" and "when `projectId` is falsy, do not call `useEntity)`", but `useEntity` is itself a hook, so that wording still needs a concrete hook-safe adapter strategy or the implementation can violate the Rules of Hooks while trying to preserve the current disabled contract.
